title: Dice Gun Commando
description:
A Bullet Heaven where you control the dice your guns rollThe Chaos Lord and its minions are here, and you're the last line of defense. Build an arsenal of dice, mods, and guns to show those aliens who's boss!

Features:• Carry up to six auto-firing weapons. Shotguns, machine guns, lightning guns, oh my!

• Dozens of different dice and hundreds of different gun mods. Massive build variety!

• Wide variety of synergies from combining dice and mods with different guns. Play it your way!

• Level up to earn rewards and make your arsenal stronger. Power overwhelming!

• Fast runs (20-30 minutes) and progressive unlocks. Roguelite stuff!

• Fight alien mobs, elites, and bosses that wield their own dice powers against you. Kill chaos!

• Break the laws of physics game. Power over-- wait, already did that one. Break stuff!

What kinds of synergies can you make?• A machine gun that spews radioactive clouds when it rolls a set of 1, 2, and 3.

• A shotgun that knocks back mobs each time it rolls a 2.

• A chickenshot that turns mobs into chickens while also slowing them down when it rolls a 3.

• A lightning gun that heals you when it rolls a pair of 1s.

• A grenade launcher that spreads madness when it rolls three 2s, causing mobs to attack each other.

• A flamethrower that recharges your shields when it rolls a pair of 4s.

• And much, much more!

Craft as absurdly overpowered a build as you can. It's what you'll need to annihilate the Chaos Lord and stop its insanity.

Be the Dice Gun Commando!
description_short: Guns roll dice. Dice trigger mods. Mods cause MAYHEM! Destroy waves of alien horrors in this bullet heaven roguelite by building an arsenal of dice-driven, synergistic weaponry.
